# Person Index (인물별 발견사항)

**Source:** Auto-generated by Dataview from atom YAML frontmatter
**Layer:** All

This page uses Dataview queries to show atoms grouped by person. Click any person section to see all findings involving that individual across all 7 layers.

## Key Persons (주요 인물)

```dataview
TABLE length(rows) AS "발견사항", min(rows.layer) + "–" + max(rows.layer) AS "층위 범위"
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE persons
FLATTEN persons AS person
GROUP BY person
SORT length(rows) DESC
LIMIT 20
```

## Person-Layer Cross Table (인물×층위 교차표)

```dataview
TABLE
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 1)) AS "L1",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 2)) AS "L2",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 3)) AS "L3",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 4)) AS "L4",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 5)) AS "L5",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 6)) AS "L6",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.layer = 7)) AS "L7",
  length(rows) AS "전체"
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE persons
FLATTEN persons AS person
GROUP BY person
SORT length(rows) DESC
LIMIT 20
```

## Key Takeaways

- Persons appearing in 3+ layers indicate cross-layer conspiracy participants
- Use this index to trace any individual's role across the 7-layer proof system
